category_sources: source_facts.description says bidirectional operation between a Subversion repository and Git; official git-scm documentation page is the git-svn manual.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-svn; official git-scm documentation page title is git-svn Documentation.
docs_sources: Official git-scm documentation has a dedicated git-svn manual page for this command.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is from kernel.org Git release tarballs, and official git-scm documentation identifies git-svn as part of the Git suite whose development is on the Git mailing list.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official git-scm git-svn documentation identify a bidirectional Git/Subversion bridge.
